news.title: No Surprises In Qualcomm’s (NASDAQ:QCOM) Q4 Sales Numbers But Stock Drops
news.summary: Wireless chipmaker Qualcomm (NASDAQ:QCOM) met Wall Street’s revenue expectations in Q4 CY2025, with sales up 5% year on year to $12.25 billion. On the other hand, next quarter’s revenue guidance of $10.6 billion was less impressive, coming in 4.9% below analysts’ estimates. Its non-GAAP profit of $3.50 per share was 2.9% above analysts’ consensus estimates.

news.title: Qualcomm stock dips as CEO flags memory constraints for handset business
news.summary: Investing.com -- Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ:QCOM) reported record quarterly revenue for the start of fiscal 2026, yet its shares tumbled 6.6% in after-hours trading on Wednesday. Investors reacted sharply to a cautious outlook that overshadowed a significant beat on both the top and bottom lines. “We are pleased to deliver strong quarterly results, with record total company revenues,” said Cristiano Amon, President and CEO of Qualcomm Incorporated. news.title: Qualcomm stock falls after revenue outlook disappoints
news.summary: AI chipmaker Qualcomm (QCOM) reported fiscal first quarter adjusted earnings of $3.50 per share compared to an estimate of $3.41. Adjusted revenue was $12.25 billion versus an expectation of $12.2 billion. For the second quarter, the company forecasts revenue of $10.2 billion to $11.0 billion. Wall Street had been expecting $11.18 billion. Yahoo Finance Tech Editor Dan Howley reports on the breaking news. To watch more expert insights and analysis on the latest market action, check out more Market Domination Overtime.

news.title: Qualcomm Earnings Release Available on Company’s Investor Relations Website
news.summary: SAN DIEGO, February 04, 2026--Qualcomm Incorporated (NASDAQ: QCOM) today announced the Company’s financial results for its first quarter of fiscal 2026 through an earnings release that is available on the Qualcomm Investor Relations website at https://investor.qualcomm.com/financial-information. The earnings release will also be furnished to the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on a Form 8-K and will be available on the SEC website at http://www.sec.gov.

news.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
news.summary: Cristiano Amon: Thank you, Mauricio.  In fiscal Q1, we delivered record revenues of $12.3 billion and non-GAAP earnings per share of $3.50.  Within QCT, record revenues of $10.6 billion were driven by strength in flagship handsets.

news.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Q1 Earnings: Taking a Look at Key Metrics Versus Estimates
news.summary: Although the revenue and EPS for Qualcomm (QCOM) give a sense of how its business performed in the quarter ended December 2025, it might be worth considering how some key metrics compare with Wall Street estimates and the year-ago numbers.

news.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Q1 Earnings Beat Estimates
news.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of +3.15% and -0.26%, respectively, for the quarter ended December 2025. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
